allow: Bash(node -e "const sdp='v=0\\r\\no=- 1 2 IN IP4 127.0.0.1\\r\\ns=-\\r\\nt=0 0\\r\\nm=audio 55924 UDP/TLS/RTP/SAVPF 111 63 9 0\\r\\na=rtpmap:111 opus/48000/2\\r\\na=rtpmap:63 red/48000/2\\r\\na=rtpmap:9 G722/8000\\r\\na=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000\\r\\nm=video 1527 UDP/TLS/RTP/SAVPF 96 97 103 104\\r\\na=rtpmap:96 VP8/90000\\r\\na=rtcp-fb:96 nack\\r\\na=rtpmap:97 rtx/90000\\r\\na=fmtp:97 apt=96\\r\\na=rtpmap:103 H264/90000\\r\\na=rtcp-fb:103 nack\\r\\na=rtpmap:104 rtx/90000\\r\\na=fmtp:104 apt=103\\r\\n';const lines=sdp.split\('\\r\\n'\);let oP=null,vP=null,vR=null;for\(const l of lines\){let m=l.match\(/^a=rtpmap:\(\\d+\) opus\\//\);if\(m\)oP=m[1];m=l.match\(/^a=rtpmap:\(\\d+\) VP8\\//\);if\(m\)vP=m[1];}if\(vP\)for\(const l of lines\){const m=l.match\(/^a=fmtp:\(\\d+\) apt=\(\\d+\)$/\);if\(m&&m[2]===vP\){vR=m[1];break;}}console.log\('opus:'+oP+' vp8:'+vP+' rtx:'+vR\);console.log\('orig lines:'+lines.filter\(Boolean\).length\);console.log\('orig bytes:'+sdp.length\)")
